rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §21.4514, which governs a continuing education clearinghouse for educators. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 21.4514. CONTINUING EDUCATION AND TRAINING CLEARINGHOUSE; ADVISORY GROUP.
_note: Rule text concerns educator continuing education; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict.
